'''Murttoc Yine''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as an [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] and a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Yine worked at<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]]<ref name="CCG" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Yine had many nefarious contacts in the criminal underworld, and was the contact point for many individuals seeking employment with Jabba.<ref name="CCG" /> In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Yine was among [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba's entourage]] present in the palace when the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], belonging to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] in order to bargain for the life of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], a friend of Skywalker's who was held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] in the palace.<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Murttoc Yine had [[Color/Legends|dark]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin, and [[Clothing/Legends|wore]] a set of [[Robe/Legends|robes]] as well as a [[Hat/Legends|hat]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Murttoc Yine first appeared as an uncredited extra in the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], during the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band's]] performance of "[[Lapti Nek/Legends|Lapti Nek]]." The scene featuring Yine was cut from the film's [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] release in [[1997]]; however, an alternate scene during the [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] Band's performance of "[[Jedi Rocks/Legends|Jedi Rocks]]" was inserted where Yine was visible.<ref name="RotJ" /> Yine would be first identified by name in a card for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]{{'s}} "[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]" set, released in [[1998]].<ref name="CCG" />
